interactions.inputs: {"companyName":"Meridian Dynamics","industry":"Technology Consulting","subsector":"Digital Transformation","transcript":"Meeting with Meridian Dynamics VP of Sales and CTO.","runId":"mock-run-touch4"}
interactions.stageContent: {"extractedFields":{"customerContext":"Meridian Dynamics is a mid-market technology consulting firm looking to modernize their client engagement workflow. Current proposal turnaround is 5-7 business days, causing lost deals to faster competitors. The VP of Sales and CTO are both aligned on the need for AI-powered proposal automation.","businessOutcomes":"Reduce proposal cycle time from 5-7 days to under 2 hours. Improve win rate by 15% through personalized, data-driven proposals. Scale proposal capacity 4x without adding headcount. Achieve full ROI within 90 days of deployment.","constraints":"Must integrate with existing Google Workspace environment (Slides, Docs, Drive). Budget approved for Q2 rollout. SOC 2 compliance documentation required before procurement sign-off. CTO wants API access for custom CRM integrations.","stakeholders":"Rachel Torres (VP of Sales) -- decision maker and executive sponsor. David Kim (CTO) -- technical evaluator requiring API access and security compliance. James Liu (Head of Operations) -- end user champion and pilot coordinator.","timeline":"Pilot starting April 2026, full rollout target by end of Q2 2026. Procurement needs SOC 2 docs 2 weeks before pilot start.","budget":"Approved for $180K annual, with potential expansion to $350K for enterprise tier. ROI expected within 90 days based on proposal volume projections."},"fieldSeverity":{"customerContext":"ok","businessOutcomes":"ok","constraints":"warning","stakeholders":"ok","timeline":"ok","budget":"ok"},"hasErrors":false}
